name: 10x10 Steel Weekender Canopy with Wind Vent and Shade Wall - Embark™: Rust-Resistant, UV-Resistant Shelter Tent
description:
The 10 x 10 Weekender Canopy with Wind Vent & Shade Wall from Embark™ offers instant shelter when and where you need it. The recycled polyester canopy with water-repellent and fade-resistant qualities also features a wind vent and shade wall for extra comfort in hot weather. Plus, it features a rust-resistant frame with four adjustable-height legs and easy-push buttons for quick setup. Bring along this versatile canopy for parties in the park, beach get-togethers and more, and simply stash it in the wheeled storage bag between uses.

Embark™: Find wonder as you wander.
